title: Nausea follow-up in GP
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Defines DHA-licensed telehealth scope and emergency and controlled-medication exclusions.
red_flags.rationale: Defines DHA telehealth scope and limits for the broader nausea/vomiting presentation.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines DHA-licensed telehealth scope and emergency and controlled-medication exclusions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Nausea and Vomiting – 08

red_flags.text: Lists severe abdominal pain, gastrointestinal bleeding, neurological symptoms, chest pain, weight loss, dehydration, altered state, and metabolic concerns.
red_flags.rationale: Relevant to concern features actually assessed; absence cannot be presumed.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists severe abdominal pain, gastrointestinal bleeding, neurological symptoms, chest pain, weight loss, dehydration, altered state, and metabolic concerns.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Nausea and Vomiting – 08

red_flags.text: Lists urgent referral features including haematemesis, neurological symptoms, chest pain, acute abdominal pain, gastrointestinal bleeding, and immunosuppression.
red_flags.rationale: Relevant to clinician-entered referral status and safety net without assigning urgency.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists urgent referral features including haematemesis, neurological symptoms, chest pain, acute abdominal pain, gastrointestinal bleeding, and immunosuppression.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Nausea and Vomiting – 08

investigations.text: States that testing is history-directed and lists glucose, blood count, inflammatory markers, electrolytes, stool culture, and urinalysis.
investigations.rationale: Relevant to investigations already reviewed or clinician selected without generating them.
investigations.evidence_extract: States that testing is history-directed and lists glucose, blood count, inflammatory markers, electrolytes, stool culture, and urinalysis.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Nausea and Vomiting – 08

medication.text: Specifies distinction between nausea, vomiting, retching, and regurgitation and records duration, frequency, associated symptoms, intake, and likely causes.
medication.rationale: Relevant to clinician-recorded symptom, hydration, pregnancy, medicine and associated-feature assessment without assigning cause.
medication.evidence_extract: Specifies distinction between nausea, vomiting, retching, and regurgitation and records duration, frequency, associated symptoms, intake, and likely causes.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Nausea and Vomiting – 08

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Cause, frequency, intake, hydration, pregnancy, medicines, neurological and abdominal findings, tests and response are absent.
No diagnosis, medicine, test, referral, admission or urgency is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
